title: List of recognized additional industrial activities under the OBPS - Canada.ca
content:

This list may be amended from time to time.
The considerations the Minister will take into account when making a determination on whether to recognize an additional industrial activity are outlined in The Policy for recognizing additional industrial activities from sectors at risk of carbon leakage and competitiveness impacts .
